core_questions.text: When do you use apps the most?
options: Morning or on the go (commute / morning coffee)
During work or study hours (screen time)

core_questions.text: When you open an app, what's your reading style?
options: Quick scanner – just looking for the bottom line
Thorough – reads and digs into every detail
Visual – mostly looking for images, icons and video
It depends – varies with how much free time I have

core_questions.text: What feeling would you most like your digital environment to convey?
options: Calm, focus, and freedom from distraction

core_questions.text: What's your fixed visual preference on screens?
options: Dark design to protect your eyes (Dark Mode)
High Contrast design for maximum readability
Automatic – changes based on time of day

deep_dive_questions.text: Where are you usually located while using your phone?
How many hours a day are you in front of screens (phone and computer combined)?
options: Light – up to 2 hours a day
Very heavy – more than 8 hours (connected most of the day)

deep_dive_questions.text: How would you describe your decision-making process?
options: Spontaneous and quick (loves trying new things)
Deliberate (analyzes and checks every detail before clicking)
Social (influenced by others' recommendations and reviews)

deep_dive_questions.text: How do your eyes react to strong colors on screen?
options: Very sensitive – prefers only soft, pastel colors
Moderately sensitive – prefers dark, calming tones
Not sensitive – loves bold, bright, neon colors

deep_dive_questions.text: Which design and art style speaks to you most in everyday life?
How do you most like to navigate within apps?
options: Built-in menus and clear buttons at the bottom

deep_dive_questions.text: What's your main motivation for using new apps?
How would you describe your attention span on mobile?
options: Very high – able to focus on one screen for a long time
Short – gets bored quickly and needs new stimuli
Multi-tasking – constantly jumps between 3 apps at once
Depends on the environment and how tired I am at the moment

deep_dive_questions.text: How tech-savvy would you consider yourself?
options: Early Adopter – always first to try new features and technologies
Advanced – knows systems well but isn't in a rush to upgrade
Practical – average, only uses what's needed day-to-day
Simplicity lover – too much technology and complicated screens stress me out
